source_of_truth.note: Always verify against GitHub code, branch, commit, diff and tests. This file is a snapshot, not a source of truth.

operational_north.plan: Plano Global v4.1 atualizado apos Supabase Foundation v1

planned_not_urgent.item: Login, public signup, roles, guards and RLS final
planned_not_urgent.note: Prototype is currently used by the developer; do not treat this as an urgent new defect unless it blocks the current milestone or creates real exposure.
Current screen contains placeholders; implement when the planned admin/security milestone begins.
A technical import UI exists, but the institutional flow with roles, preview, validation and governance remains planned.
Depends on role and director-school access model.
Proceed only when document contracts and templates are validated.

planned_not_urgent.item: Hardening, smoke, accessibility, logs and bundle work
planned_not_urgent.note: Continuous quality work, not a blocker for the current prototype stage unless a concrete regression appears.

document_generation_constraints: Fill MEMORIA directly from vw_unidade_detalhe data
Do not depend on the BASE sheet for the individual file
Do not depend on XLOOKUP for the individual file
Do not publish templates in public/ with real consolidated BASE data
Remove the BASE sheet from generated individual workbooks if present
Preserve template layout, formulas, borders and merged cells
Keep official document rules under human review
mandatory_before_task: Read docs/HANDOFF.md as a snapshot only
Verify the actual GitHub main/head/code before deciding

documentation_update_policy.rule: Documentation follows development; it must not trap the project in reconciliation loops.
when_to_open_doc_only_pr: When documentation can induce the next task to run against the wrong milestone or file path
When it marks completed work as pending or pending work as completed in a way that changes decisions
When a new decision changes scope, priority, safety or acceptance criteria
when_to_fold_into_next_pr: Minor commit SHA drift without operational consequence
Purely historical metadata that does not affect the next task
Small wording updates that do not alter priority or scope

next_priority.method: Start with a small technical contract for editable fields, permission model, validation and audit trail before UI implementation.
